title: collinsonia australis
intro: Collinsonia australis, also known as Australian stone root, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family, native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and expectorant qualities, which help to relieve congestion and coughs. The health benefits of Collinsonia australis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Collinsonia australis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
